architectReview.evidence: Architecture: shared error-signal.mjs (ajv validation + throw->typed-signal + secret redaction) is the single boundary layer; tools/index.mjs is the catalog seam the server registers, so tools/list reflects real capability and later phases extend one list. Product: Phase-1 acceptance met — cloak_setup/status/cookies_list/cookies_status are read-only and session-less (no launch); cookie values redacted; account ambiguity returns structured needs-account. Code: tools import the engine facade (ensureWorkspace, cookie.mjs) unchanged; no duplicated cookie logic; invalid input returns invalid-args rather than throwing.
commands: leader architect review over G002 changeset (mcp/src/error-signal.mjs, tools/setup.mjs, tools/cookies.mjs, tools/index.mjs, server wiring, tests)

executorQa.evidence: Contract tests drive each tool handler and the live stdio catalog: redaction proven (no secret leaks), needs-account signal proven, invalid-args proven non-throwing. Full mcp suite (11 tests) green including the Phase-0 real-browser spike and bundle/import checks.

artifactRefs.description: Phase 1 API QA report: commands + adversarial cases

contractCoverage.obligation: cookie values redacted; no secret in results/logs
multi-account site with no account -> structured needs-account
invalid input becomes a structured signal

surfaceEvidence.invocation: direct handler calls + live stdio tools/list of cloak_setup/status/cookies_list/cookies_status

adversarialCases.scenario: list cookies whose records carry secret values
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: values redacted; raw secret never in output

iteration.evidence: Leader ai-slop-cleaner sweep on the G002 changeset: no blocking findings — no fallback masking (needs-account is grounded engine state, invalid-args is real validation), no duplication (single SELECTION_SCHEMA, single error mapper), no dead code. Verification rerun clean.
